name: Hollow Remnant
short_description: Journey through the shadows of medieval fantasy as a Hollow Remnant. Forgotten to life, yet unbeknownst to death, you proceed along a veil of fragmented souls. Bump back against that which dwells in the dark, with instruments crucial to your survival.
detailed_description:
Journey through the shadows of medieval fantasy as a Hollow Remnant. Forgotten to life, yet unbeknownst to death, you proceed along a veil of fragmented souls. Bump back against that which dwells in the dark, with instruments crucial to your survival.

Hollow Remnant is a VR action experience with survival horror elements. Engage hordes of unyielding foes as you journey through the shadow of dark medieval fantasy. Upgrade and leverage an arsenal of weaponry commanding the elements.

Features:
- Wave based experience
- Large explorable environments
- Diverse enemy types
- An arsenal of exotic weaponry
- Player & weapon enhancement
